dailyNews.title: China's expanding surveillance state and crackdowns draw global scrutiny
dailyNews.description: Concerns grow over China's global surveillance technology and repression of Uyghurs. The World Uyghur Congress highlighted these issues. Activists marked 36 years since the Baren Uprising, a key moment of Uyghur resistance. Demonstrations called for justice. China's new economic security framework also raises global unease.

dailyNews.title: Why Pak's Asim Munir meets Iranian delegation in military uniform but suits up for JD Vance | Decoded
dailyNews.description: Iran and US mark their high-stakes talks in Pakistan's Islamabad. Asim Munir who received delegates from both nations had a change of attire. Check it out.

dailyNews.title: Video: ‘Crucial talks’ says Al Jazeera reporter at US-Iran meeting venue
dailyNews.description: Talks involving officials from Iran and Pakistani mediators have begun in Islamabad.

dailyNews.title: Cong slams ‘Vishwaguru's huglomacy’ as Pakistan plays US-Iran peacemaker
dailyNews.description: Cong comms chief Jairam Ramesh asked, rhetorically, if “self-declared Vishwaguru” Modi’s personal rapport with Trump had yielded any strategic returns.

dailyNews.title: US-Iran war: Why is Tehran unable to open Strait of Hormuz to more shipping traffic? American officials reveal
dailyNews.description: US officials said that Iran struggles to reopen the Strait of Hormuz due to uncertainty over naval mine locations and its inability to clear them. A two-week cease-fire would depend on the ‘complete, immediate, and safe opening’ of the Strait of Hormuz, Trump said on Tuesday.

dailyNews.title: Swalwell ripped for changing his tune on how sexual assault victims 'deserve to be heard'
dailyNews.description: Rep. Eric Swalwell's calls on lawmakers to hear out women raising allegations against Supreme Court Justice nominee Brett Kavanaugh are clashing with cease-and-desist letters.

dailyNews.title: WATCH: Eviction standoff turns war zone as gunman kills deputy in ambush, gets run over by armored vehicle
dailyNews.description: Deputy Randy Hoppert was killed in a Porterville, California, standoff after a suspect opened fire as deputies served an eviction notice.

dailyNews.title: Top White House officials encouraged potential Bondi replacement to make case to Trump for AG job: Sources
dailyNews.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche made his pitch to President Trump just hours after Pam Bondi was dismissed on why he should be the next AG, sources told Fox News Digital.

dailyNews.title: Russia seizes control of US-linked firm as it pushes for renewed ties with Washington
dailyNews.description: Pennsylvania-linked manufacturer CANPACK says Russia seized control of its $700 million business under a Kremlin decree signed by President Putin.

dailyNews.title: STEVE FORBES: No more delusions — America has to finish the job in Iran
dailyNews.description: The author argues the West must not waver on Iran, urging Strait of Hormuz bypass pipelines and resumed pressure after Islamabad negotiations.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Racing to Redefine ‘America First’ in a Time of War
dailyNews.description: Washington has been debating the thrust of Mr. Trump’s foreign policy for more than a decade, with the only consensus being that “America First” means whatever the president says it does.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s War of Choice Will Become a War of Regret
dailyNews.description: America may be losing more than just the conflict in Iran.

dailyNews.title: U.K. Puts Chagos Islands Deal on Hold Following Criticism From Trump
dailyNews.description: The plan to give Mauritius formal control of the islands, home to a U.S.-British military base, was called “an act of great stupidity” by President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Is Hungarian leader and MAGA darling Viktor Orbán about to be ousted?
dailyNews.description: The latest polls indicate that Viktor Orbán, an international ally of President Trump, and his Fidedz party are trailing the rival Tisza party.

dailyNews.title: Trump proposes covering executive office building's stone facade with white paint
dailyNews.description: The building sits across a driveway from the West Wing and was completed in 1888.

dailyNews.title: US and Iranian Negotiators Arrive in Pakistan for Peace Talks
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance has arrived in Pakistan for high-stakes peace talks between the United States and Iran. The Iranians demands include the lifting of sanctions while the Trump administration is looking for multiple concessions, including the release of American detainees. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for Saturday TODAY from Islamabad.

dailyNews.title: Inside Kristen Welker's interview with the Cuban president
dailyNews.description: In his first interview with a U.S. broadcast network, Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel insisted to @MeetThePress moderator Kristen Welker that he's not "stepping down," despite the Trump administration's increasing pressure on Cuba. Kristen joins "Here's the Scoop" to discuss what was happening behind the scenes during her interview.

dailyNews.title: Trump releases designs for proposed D.C. arch
dailyNews.description: Trump releases designs for proposed D.C. arch

dailyNews.title: Trump praises Palantir as stock has worst week in over a year and Iran conflict drags on
dailyNews.description: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.

dailyNews.title: U.S. oil slips below $100 as Trump demands reopening of Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday warned Iran to "stop now" if it was charging tankers to transit the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump's 250-foot 'triumphal arch' would loom over Potomac, new renderings show
dailyNews.description: Rep. Don Beyer said "President Trump is focused on a taxpayer-funded vanity project that would choke traffic, block our skyline, and tower over sacred ground."
